name: MyKK.us
tagline: Browser dashboard + Chrome extension — start page done right
description: Browser dashboard ecosystem: mykk.us (landing), start.mykk.us (GridStack.js drag-and-drop widgets — radar, Pomodoro, clock, weather, moon phase, ICS calendar), and the Chrome launcher extension pointing at start.mykk.us. Vanilla JS, static hosting, local storage only.
